122.reason: [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been updated to q->next leads to undefined behavior. Also, the node pointed by q itself is never freed, and freeing q->last here may attempt to free NULL or already-freed memory.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been updated to q->next leads to undefined behavior. Also, the node pointed by q itself is never freed, and freeing q->last here may attempt to free NULL or already-freed memory.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory through an already advanced pointer; q has been updated to q->next, so q->last is invalid and may cause undefined behavior or crash. Also, this leads to double-free or invalid free.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been updated to q->next leads to undefined behavior. When q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid. Also, the node pointed to by q itself is never freed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using q->last after q has been advanced; when q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid. Also, freeing nodes in this manner causes double-free or invalid free because each node may be freed multiple times via different pointers.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Attempting to free memory using 'q->last' after 'q' has already been advanced; when q becomes NULL, q->last is invalid. Also, freeing nodes in this manner leads to double-free or invalid free because the same node may be freed multiple times or accessed after being freed.]
